message:
✨ Add OpenShift cluster detection from namespaces

- Add distribution and namespaces fields to ClusterInfo interface
- Detect cluster distribution by checking for system namespaces:
  - openshift-* namespaces → OpenShift
  - gke-* namespaces → GKE
  - aws-*/amazon-* namespaces → EKS
  - azure-* namespaces → AKS
  - cattle-* namespaces → Rancher
- Update ClusterHealth to use detected distribution for provider icon
- Detection runs async after health check to avoid blocking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
